description: You are an Architect adapting a residential home model for a hot-summer climate. Open the existing project file located at '~/Documents/Energy3D/building-passive-heating.ng3'. First, change the project's geographic location/city to Phoenix (Arizona, USA). Next, locate the South-facing wall of the building and add 1.5-meter window overhangs to all the windows on that specific wall to reduce summer solar heat gain (do not add overhangs to other walls). Run a 'Daily Building Energy Analysis' (Analysis > Building Energy > Daily Building Energy Analysis) to simulate the thermal performance and view the graph. Finally, save the modified project as a new file: '~/Documents/Energy3D/phoenix_passive.ng3'.
